title: Primer Primitives
summary: GitHub Primer's official primitives repository containing inspectable base and functional tokens that back a dense, multi-theme product UI. Demonstrates base→functional→component token dependency and color-mode contracts. Active Primer ecosystem pushed 2026-07-15.
lessons: Use as evidence for base→functional→component token dependency chains.
Study color-mode contracts for multi-theme token architecture.
caveats: Primitives reflect GitHub's product density and brand; link token architecture patterns to existing Primer guidance rather than importing values.
licenseNote: MIT license; verify before using any token values directly.
antiImitationNote: Transfer token dependency architecture; do not import GitHub's specific color values or brand-specific functional token names.
